programs.title: Australia's Deadliest
programs.desc: A young woman is viciously mauled by a great white shark, while a man's holiday is cut short when he is bitten by a deadly brown snake and a young boy goes into anaphylactic shock from an ant bite.

programs.title: Escape To The Country
programs.desc: Surrounded by concrete and noisy traffic, most city people are tempted to quit the rat-race for the peace of the countryside. In this series, experts Jules Hudson, Alistair Appleton, Aled Jones and Denise Nurse help people to achieve that dream, finding property with potential and guiding prospective buyers through every aspect of buying, selling and moving.

programs.title: Harry's Practice
programs.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programs.title: Million Dollar Minute
programs.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?
